ddls:
CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the influencer */,
  "twitter_id" TEXT /* Twitter ID of the influencer */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the influencer belongs to */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the influencer's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the influencer */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the influencer has */,
  "average_engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate of the influencer's content */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date when the influencer was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content category */,
  "content_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the content category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the content category belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer who posted the content */,
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content category the post belongs to */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was posted */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of engagements (likes, shares, comments) the post has received */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL to the original post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the post */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions of other influencers or users in the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_content_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_content_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("content_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the metrics are for */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the content has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the content has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments the content has received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the content has received */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the content (likes + shares + comments) / impressions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES influencer_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has been assigned */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the report */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to access the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., influencer engagement, category trend analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter setting */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer the filter applies to */,
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content category the filter applies to */,
  "filter_json" TEXT /* JSON object containing filter settings */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_filters_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("content_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_filters_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trending topic */,
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content category the trend belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score representing the popularity of the trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trending topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("content_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content category the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predicted trend or influencer */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., trend emergence, influencer rise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("content_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_networks" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "connected_influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connected influencer */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the influencers (e.g., collaboration, mention) */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date when the influencers were connected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id", "connected_influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_content_tags" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "tag_id")
)
